title: BE Style Wither
description: Brings the behavior of Wither closer to Bedrock Edition
body:
# BE Style Wither
This mod brings Wither's behavior closer to Bedrock Edition. 

Includes adjustments such as:
- To be able to bounce off the blue wither skull
- Like shooting more blue wither skulls
- Whitens and spins when summoned
- It explodes when its health is more than half, and summons a wither skeleton when the difficulty level is above Normal.
- It explodes when it dies.
- Charge attack when health is below half
- Maintaining a weakened state
- Doubles health (v1.4.0 and above)

If it is version 1.4.0 or later, it can be switched with config

## ModPack
Please use it freely.
